summary: MOCCal is a Python application for high-dimensional, multi-omic traveling-wave ion mobility mass spectrometry (TWIM-MS) data analysis.
MOCCal provides functionality for collision cross section (CCS) calibration.
MOCCal provides functionality for experimental data biomolecular class assignment. MOCCal provides functionality for experimental class-specific CCS calculations.
MOCCal offers class assignment and CCS calculations without needing to identify features first.
